══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Duergar — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Duergar — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Duergar — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 9 damage. Duergar — Armored Escapist HP: 50/59
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 16 damage. Duergar — Armored Escapist HP: 34/59
